## For new entries — the one rule of this list

- [ ] Added the work to [`docs/works.js`](../docs/works.js) with a **next-state** description and all fields (`space`, `cond`, `unc`, `obj`, `x`, `y`, `ladder`, `group`).
- [ ] Added the matching entry to [`README.md`](../README.md) in the right section, keeping the 🟢 **Next state:** tag.
- [ ] Ran `node scripts/validate-works.js` locally and it passes.
- [ ] The link is a primary source (paper / project page / official blog), not a news rehash.
